_comment: NPC: Wang Yiyi (王一一). Canon ID: N08. Per user directive: every miscellaneous NPC from RI must be accounted for. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Wang Yiyi
personality: young village girl; helps her mother; quiet but observant

perception_tiers.mortal: Wang Lin's little sister. Quiet. Helps her mother with everything.
perception_tiers.qi_condensation: Wang Yiyi. Wang Lin's sister from the village. If she cultivates, she has come a long way.
perception_tiers.core_formation: That is Wang Yiyi. She used to help her mother cook in the village.
perception_tiers.nascent_soul: Wang Yiyi. From the village kitchen to the Nascent Soul stage — if she made it.

note: Chapter 1: Wang Lin's younger sister, mortal village girl, helps mother Wang Qingyue with cooking and household tasks. INFERRED (RI Ch.1) — the Wang family includes younger siblings. AUTO-CANON-078: fixed from 'Paragon-tier' to 'mortal' — the previous value was a canon accuracy error (endgame power on a Chapter 1 village child).

personality_traits._comment: INFERRED: Young village girl, daughter of Wang Tianshui and Wang Qingyue. Helpful, quiet, moderate traits. Not a Paragon-tier cultivator — that was a data error.

dao_heart.note: 0-100. A cracked Dao heart blocks breakthrough regardless of Qi. Per canon: Wang Lin's Dao heart is famously tested at every major realm.

desires.what: Offer to help Qingyue prepare food
desires.why: Wang Yiyi is the daughter. Helping her mother is expected.
desires.source: INFERRED: RI Ch.1. Wang Yiyi is Wang Lin's sister. A daughter helping her mother cook is consistent with the rural setting.
desires.line: Mother, let me help with the cooking today.
